reviews.review_description:
I was looking something that simple yet capable of creating complex models for so long. I tried everything on my computer couldnt get my skills up there. But this one.. 
I can create anything that I can imagine in very short time. 

Features that I would like: 
1) a better shading. Face colors are hard to differentiate when there are lots of faces. A shading method could solve it I guess. 
2) when moving objects, a pivot or some other method to rotate and place them more precisely. For example only rotate or only move object.

Hey devs, I really like this app. I've been looking for a vr modeling that I could use for a while now and I have to say that I feel like I've struck gold with poly sketch. I love how I can edit each vertex individually which allows for any shape to be made. Even though I haven't purchased that full game yet I certainly plan on doing it very soon. I understand that this is in its early phases of development so I thought I might make some suggestions. 

First it would be great if you could add a tool for merging different objects into one object so that when I want to move one of my creations, I don't have to select every different piece. Either that or allow me to change the colors of individual parts of a creation without changing the color of the whole thing.

Second, It would be wonderful if there was a tool for moving objects on a specific axis. And also for rotating something in place.

Other than that. I love your app. Can only see it getting even better in the future. Thanks devs!

reviews.review_title: Fun and low barrier to entry
reviews.review_description:
What I love about this app is that within about 10 minutes you'll know and understand most of the tools available to you and then you just start being creative! Coming from a non-artist background I've found the vast array of tools in other apps a little intimidating, but with Polysketch you can pretty much pick up and go, and end up with a usable model that looks fairly good on its own. 

Look forward to seeing more updates!

developer_response.body: Thanks very much Jane, so happy the tool is helping you out, that's exactly the idea! :)

reviews.review_description: Note to devs: I didn't see any options for free hand other than straight lines.  Anyway to use it as a sketch tool for 3d designs to send to printer?

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the review! The free-draw feature is coming soon I hope, yes! We also have a spline-like tool (for pipes, wires, branches, etc), almost done. You can definitely export for 3D printing, that's one of my favorites - here's how: https://www.polysketchvr.com/learn/#Exporting-and-Using-in-Other-Applications

reviews.review_description:
I've been waiting for an app like this for years. There are numerous good apps focused on scultping in VR like Medium, SculptrVR, Shapelab, Substance 3D Modeler, etc.
But for less organic shapes or game assets (low poly) 'polygon modeling' is the first choice and that's exactly what Polysketch offers in the easiest way I've ever seen in a 3D modeling software (and I know a lot like 3ds Max, Maya, Blender). With Polysketch I was able to design simple game assets after just half an hour of training! I also think it's brilliant that the mesh doesn't have to be composed of quads or triangles! It is enough to draw/connect 'ANY POLYGONS' and the mesh will be generated automatically. I hope the app will be officially approved in the store soon! Unfortunately, innovative apps are still rare here.

developer_response.body: Hi A6000, thanks very much, this is exactly what we are aiming for! Simple, fun, creative modeling that can be used immediately in games/art/etc. So happy to hear it's working out for you! Best, Gabe/Bill

reviews.review_description: I found this so basic it's actually quite unusable for any real modeling task. I get it that it's in beta but TBH asking for $ for this, at its current state, is not justified in my opinion. This should have been an open beta for gathering thoughts from users.

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry it didn't work as you expected, we're happy to approve a refund if you need! :)  We can also invite you to our test channel if you'd like to stick around and try new features as we add them, with the option to re-purchase later, only if you feel the app has met your needs :). Lastly, we'd really like to know what your specific expectations and issues were, if you have time to send detailed feedback - best, Gabe/Bill

reviews.review_description: This app is tons of fun to use. I've always struggled with 3d modeling tools, but this lets me make quick and dirty creations with limited complexity.

reviews.review_title: Great beginnings... The Next Tilt Brush?
reviews.review_description: Great tool, I enjoy working in 3D Space sometimes to brainstorm. Considering this is in Alpha its already a great start.  The only thing it is missing in my opinion is more drawing tools, and some underlying tools to detect face generation when attaching new faces to existing faces.  I get that its mostly for modelling, but some people are going to want that simple line drawing or pencil writing type feel. Maybe add menu for line drawing.  Since Tilt Brush has been made open source, maybe you can use some of their "tools"?  Regardless... I will be utilizing this for my meshes when in VR.  Awesome!  Worth the price

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks Rick! Really great to hear we're helping you out. You'll be happy to know that tools for regular sketching and painting (TiltBrush style) are mostly built already, just hidden until they are ready for real use. If you'd like to give more feedback, or get info on upcoming features, we'd love to have you join our reddit page, "polysketch". Thanks again! - Gabe and Bill

reviews.review_title: Great way to be creative in VR
reviews.review_description:
Polysketch is a great pickup-and-go app to create 3D models in VR. The interface is fairly intuitive, and the overall presentation is pretty straightforward and user-friendly. Also, the developers have been responsive on their Discord and social media like Twitter and Reddit, and they've been quick to integrate feedback into each software revision.

I've been amazed at how easily I've been able to generate  objects (stylized for sure due to the low-poly nature, which lends itself to sketches/concepts), and how genuinely fun it is to just sit on the couch and create stuff from scratch. It's like doodling in my sketchbook, but in 3D *and* VR. Really good stuff!

developer_response.body: Aww thanks Benerator! It's been AWESOME to see all the great stuff you are creating and sharing. Definitely feeling "somebody had a lot of fun creating these", that's the best result! Looking forward to getting more of those features in! -GW

reviews.review_description: Wow. So easy to use, so much fun! The only two things I am missing are Cloud-Export (GDrive, OneDrive, ...) and maybe a Lasso Tool. But even without that it is one of the killer apps of VR, IMHO. Great Job, Devs!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much El_Loote! Yes, we'd love to add cloud saves and more tooling ... soon, we hope! Best, GW

reviews.review_description:
So intuitive and fun to make polygonal modeling.
Just want to have clear way to select and delete certain polygon(sometimes it works, sometimes it removes polygons that I didn’t want)

developer_response.body: Hi vanz.kim, great to hear you like it so much! Could you connect on Discord/email/social with that polygon issue? We'll take a look right away!

reviews.review_description: If you want to create your 3D stuff life-sized while moving a bit and not on a small screen sitting like a shrimp this is absolutely for you. Don't be intimidated to try it, the learning curve is pretty OK and you get a lot of (and immediate) satisfaction from it.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much Lorenzo! Super happy you are loving it :)

reviews.review_description:
This app isn't getting the popularity that it should be compared to all of the other 3d drawing apps. The drawing mechanics are really good and simple, and it makes it incredibly easy to create 3d shapes. I have a lot of experience with gravity sketch, and this tops it in terms of a user-friendly experience. Great work!

I know that it's still in its early stages, but I did notice that whenever I move my head or controllers around, it will do a short lag and then return to normal. Don't know if it's a performance issue or a bug.

developer_response.body: Thanks much, simplicity is exactly the goal! :) We'll look into those lags you mentioned!

reviews.review_title: this is gonna be big one day!
reviews.review_description:
After seeing some of the amazing creations on reddit made in this app, i decided to give this a try. I got to try this for free as a tester, because of how early in development it is.. but i ended up buying it like half an hour into trying it. I was blown away, it's just so good! I want it to succeed!

It turns 3d modelling into something simple, way less complex than your traditional modeling software like blender, 3ds max and the like. What you make in it can be exported for use as a 3d model in any software that takes 3d models! So like 3d printers, software like blender, game engines, you name it.

The workflow is nice and intuitive. You basically draw the outline of a shape, then either start creating 3d outline drawings of it (like drawing a cube on paper), or extrude (it's like taking a surface and extending it. it'll make sense when you see it in action). You can set colors per thing you draw, so you can quickly make models with lots of different colors in them, without having to worry about textures.

It reminds me of LittleBigPlanet and Dreams, two games by MediaMolecule that were known for their intuitive creation tools and the many amazing creations made in them. Dreams also took 3d modeling and made it simple and intuitive, in a different way.

This could EASILY become the next tiltbrush, gravity sketch, or even rival big 3d creation software like Blender as well as creative games like Dreams and LBP that make 3d creation fun. It's a shame it's so unknown yet, it deserves a way bigger audience, and i hope it ends up on the main quest store someday!

Dev, you've struck gold with the intuitiveness and simplicity. Please don't let feature requests bog that down, keep it nice, simple, and intuitive, but better and better at what it does!

developer_response.body: Aww thanks SO much, this is exactly what we're hoping to make possible! We love Blender, etc, but Polysketch is all about creativity and simplicity, with real, useful results. So happy it's been such a help for you, and thanks for all the feedback and discussion too! Excited to see what you create! Best, Gabe and Bill
